title: Marketing Coordinator
description: PepsiCo is seeking a Marketing Coordinator to support our North American regional marketing operations in Chicago. You'll coordinate campaigns, manage marketing assets, and collaborate with cross-functional teams to bring our brands to market. This role offers exposure to marketing strategy and execution at a Fortune 500 company.
responsibilities: Coordinate marketing campaigns from concept through execution, managing timelines and deliverables
Organize and maintain marketing asset libraries, ensuring accessibility and brand compliance
Assist with event planning, promotional activities, and brand activation initiatives
Track marketing metrics and compile reporting data for leadership review
Support market research and competitive analysis activities

requirements.education: Bachelor's degree in Marketing, Communications, or related field
skills: Project management and strong organizational abilities
Proficiency with Microsoft Office and marketing software
Strong written and verbal communication skills
Creativity and attention to brand guidelines
Ability to manage multiple projects simultaneously

benefits: Paid time off and paid holidays
